3220770.name: Tales of Eldoria
3220770.description:
Story

The sun is gone.

Long ago, a hero sealed the dragons within the Arcadia dungeons to save the world. His victory came at a terrible cost. The sun vanished, leaving Eldoria trapped in eternal moonlight.

As darkness spreads and hope fades, a young orphan named Liora is drawn toward the very dungeons that ended the age of light. With her companions Elysia, Thalia, and Borin, she descends into Arcadia, chasing a fragile hope: that the sun can be restored, and the world given a second dawn.

Tales of Eldoria is a story driven JRPG about sacrifice and the bonds formed when the world is already broken.

Key Features

  • A Character Focused Journey
    Build bonds between party members, uncover their pasts, and see how relationships shape both the story and the road ahead.

  • Strategic Turn-Based Combat
    Engage in classic JRPG battles where elemental strengths, party composition, and timing matter. Choose the right characters for each encounter and adapt as enemies grow more dangerous.

  • Deep Crafting and Progression
    Gather materials from your journey and craft potions, gear, and powerful equipment essential to surviving the depths of Arcadia.

  • The Arcadia Dungeons
    Explore shifting dungeons filled with puzzles, secrets, and hidden paths. From icy caverns to forgotten castles and places lost to time, each descent brings new dangers and discoveries.

The sun once saved the world.

Now it’s your turn to decide what it will cost to bring it back.

Wishlist now to stay updated and be among the first to unravel the mysteries of Eldoria.

Staff
